{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Death aura
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Death aura]] is a type of [[aura]] that [[Jai Daishou]] has learned to see.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The tunnel crawled with death [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
